top_stories.title: SailPoint plans to buy Entro to pour non-human identities into its “Agentic Fabric”
top_stories.summary: SailPoint announced plans to acquire Entro, a Tel Aviv-based startup specializing in securing non-human identities such as credentials, keys, and machine accounts. The acquisition is intended to integrate Entro's capabilities into SailPoint's "Agentic Fabric" platform, expanding its identity governance coverage to non-human identities.

top_stories.title: SailPoint acquires AI agent security startup Entro for reported $200M
top_stories.summary: SailPoint is acquiring Entro Security, a startup specializing in securing AI agents, for a reported $200 million. The deal expands SailPoint's identity governance platform to address the growing challenge of securing non-human identities and AI agents in enterprise environments.

top_stories.title: Omada Agent Governance helps organizations manage AI agent access, risk, and compliance
top_stories.summary: Omada Identity has launched Omada Agent Governance, a new solution designed to extend identity governance and administration (IGA) controls to AI agents and non-human identities. The product applies the same governance discipline used for human identities — including access management, risk management, and compliance — to AI agents operating within organizations.

top_stories.title: Okta expands Google Cloud partnership to secure AI agents and the browser
top_stories.summary: Okta has expanded its partnership with Google Cloud to integrate identity governance capabilities with AI agents and Chrome browser security. The deal combines Okta's identity layer with Google Cloud infrastructure to address authentication and authorization for AI agents and browser-based access.

top_stories.title: 1Password acquires Apono to govern what AI agents can do once they’re inside
top_stories.summary: 1Password has acquired Apono, an Israeli startup specializing in real-time access control for humans, machines, and AI agents within enterprise environments. The deal extends 1Password's identity security platform into agentic AI access governance, addressing the emerging challenge of managing what AI agents are permitted to access inside corporate systems.

news.title: How security teams are getting credential visibility into developer endpoints
news.summary: GitGuardian is addressing credential visibility on developer endpoints as supply chain attacks increasingly target secrets stored on developer machines. The article covers how security teams can detect exposed credentials across developer environments amid a wave of supply chain attacks targeting GitHub repositories, npm, PyPI, and other package ecosystems.

news.title: Sweeping Credential-Harvesting Heist Compromises 30K+ Fortinet Devices
news.summary: A large-scale credential-harvesting attack has compromised over 30,000 Fortinet devices across nearly 200 countries. Attackers have compiled a verified list of working credentials from the breached devices, spanning multiple sectors globally.

news.title: FortiBleed leak exposes Fortinet VPN credentials for 73,000 devices.
news.summary: A data leak called "FortiBleed" has exposed Fortinet and FortiGate VPN credentials for 73,932 firewall URLs belonging to organizations worldwide. The leaked data includes VPN authentication credentials, directly impacting access management and network security for affected organizations.

news.title: Why Account Takeovers Are Rising and How to Stop Them
news.summary: Specops Software published an analysis on the rise of account takeover attacks, focusing on methods such as phishing, session hijacking, and MFA fatigue. The article examines how device trust and continuous verification function as countermeasures to reduce account takeover risk.

news.title: The Top 10 Attack Surface Exposures in 2026
news.summary: An article outlines the top 10 attack surface exposures predicted for 2026, including credential-based threats and exposed admin panels. The piece references a vulnerability called MongoBleed that allowed attackers to extract credentials and session tokens from server memory without authentication.

news.title: Aembit Extends IAM for Agentic AI to Microsoft Copilot Studio
news.summary: Aembit announced support for Microsoft Copilot Studio at Identiverse 2026, extending its IAM capabilities to Microsoft's enterprise AI agent platform. The integration focuses on identity and access management for agentic AI workloads running within Copilot Studio.

news.title: Access control flaw left FIFA World Cup match streams wide-open
news.summary: A security researcher discovered an access control flaw that left FIFA World Cup match streams exposed and exploitable. The vulnerability allowed unauthorized access to camera controls and live stream keys, demonstrating a failure in authorization enforcement on the platform.

news.title: UK to require ID or face scan before you can make social media accounts
news.summary: The UK government will require users to verify their age via ID upload or facial age scan before creating social media accounts, with the rule taking effect in spring 2027. Security experts have raised concerns about circumvention risks and potential data breach vulnerabilities associated with the identity verification requirement.

news.title: Chinese Hackers Abused Google Workspace Rules to Steal Research and Defense Emails
news.summary: A China-linked espionage group breached North American medical, academic, and military research networks by stealing login credentials via a backdoor on REDCap research servers. The attackers then manipulated victims' Google Workspace email forwarding rules to silently exfiltrate sensitive emails over a period exceeding one year.

news.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of SailPoint, Inc. - SAIL
news.summary: Pomerantz Law Firm has announced an investigation into claims on behalf of investors of SailPoint, Inc. (NASDAQ: SAIL). The notice advises affected investors to contact the firm but provides no details about the nature of the claims being investigated.

news.title: The Trust Problem in Modern SaaS: Why Your Authentication Succeeded, and You Still Got Breached
news.summary: The article examines how SaaS security breaches occur despite successful authentication, focusing on the problem of over-trusted valid credentials persisting across interconnected systems. The piece addresses core IAM concepts including authentication trust boundaries, session persistence, and the limitations of systems that don't continuously verify identity.

news.title: AppViewX extends machine identity security to ai agents and post-quantum environments
news.summary: AppViewX has launched Agent Identity Security, a new product designed to discover, govern, secure, and monitor AI agent identities across enterprise environments. The solution also addresses post-quantum security requirements and extends the company's existing machine identity management platform.

news.title: AppViewX Launches Agent Identity Security to Govern Agents for the AI and Quantum Era
news.summary: AppViewX has launched a new product called Agent Identity Security, designed to govern AI agents in the context of AI and quantum computing challenges. The solution targets the emerging need to manage and secure non-human/machine identities, specifically AI agents, within enterprise environments.

news.title: Keeper Security Launches Integration With Wiz to Remediate Critical Cloud Vulnerabilities
news.summary: Keeper Security has launched an integration with cloud security platform Wiz, connecting Keeper's identity security and PAM capabilities with Wiz's vulnerability discovery. The integration enables closed-loop remediation of cloud vulnerabilities by combining Wiz's detection with Keeper's zero-trust, zero-knowledge identity security platform.

news.title: Beyond Identity launches Ceros AI agent security platform
news.summary: Beyond Identity launched Ceros, a new platform designed to secure AI agents for enterprise environments. The company, which has raised over $200 million in funding, is expanding its IAM product portfolio into AI agent identity security.

news.title: I Could've Rickrolled the FIFA World Cup. All I Needed Was My ID
news.summary: A security researcher discovered that FIFA's Agent Platform allowed anyone to register with just an ID and gain unauthorized access to the Football Data Platform's Streaming Management panel. The vulnerability exposed RTMP ingest URLs and stream keys for every live FIFA World Cup 2026 camera feed due to insufficient access controls on the registration and authorization flow.

news.title: AI demands an identity reset
news.summary: Computer Weekly published a buyer's guide examining how AI, particularly agentic AI, is transforming identity and access management systems. The piece includes insights from early adopters of agentic AI and explores the evolving demands on IAM infrastructure.

news.title: Computer Weekly – 16 June 2026: AI demands an identity reset
news.summary: Computer Weekly's 16 June 2026 issue features a buyer's guide examining how AI, particularly agentic AI, is transforming identity and access management systems. The issue includes interviews with early agentic AI implementers and covers the implications for IAM infrastructure.

news.title: One-Click Microsoft 365 Copilot Flaw Could Have Let Attackers Steal Emails, Files, and MFA Codes
news.summary: Varonis Threat Labs discovered a chain of three vulnerabilities in Microsoft 365 Copilot Enterprise Search, dubbed "SearchLeak," that could allow attackers to exfiltrate emails, calendar data, files, and MFA codes with a single click. The attack bypassed traditional anti-phishing and URL filtering tools because it leveraged a legitimate microsoft.com domain link.

news.title: The Onboarding Password Mistake That Creates Unnecessary Risk
news.summary: The article addresses security risks associated with temporary onboarding passwords, focusing on how initial credentials shared via email or SMS can persist and create vulnerabilities. The piece covers common mistakes such as password reuse across accounts and failure to enforce password changes during the employee onboarding process.

news.title: Assigning Microsoft Graph API Application Permissions to a Managed Identity Using Azure CLI
news.summary: The article covers how to assign Microsoft Graph API application permissions to Azure Managed Identities using Azure CLI. It addresses retrieving App Role IDs and the required Microsoft Entra roles needed to complete the configuration.

news.title: Lumos Launches the Identity Agent Force to Govern Access for Every Human, NHI, and AI Identity
news.summary: Lumos has launched a product called the Identity Agent Force, a suite of AI-powered agents designed to automate identity governance across human, non-human, and AI identities. The offering targets identity teams dealing with manual access management workloads and aims to address risks from non-human identities (NHIs) and agentic AI systems.

news.title: NewCore raises $66m to give AI agents a corporate identity
news.summary: NewCore has emerged from stealth with $66 million in funding to build an identity governance platform for both human employees and AI agents. The platform addresses the growing challenge of managing and authenticating non-human identities, specifically AI agents accessing corporate systems.

news.title: NewCore raises $66M to build identity infrastructure for AI agents
news.summary: NewCore has raised $66 million to build identity infrastructure specifically designed for AI agents. The funding targets non-human identity management, addressing the growing need to authenticate and authorize AI agents operating within enterprise environments.

news.title: As AI agents become employees, NewCore emerges with $66M to give them identities | TechCrunch
news.summary: NewCore has emerged from stealth with $66 million in funding to provide identity infrastructure for AI agents. The company focuses on giving AI agents verifiable identities as they increasingly operate autonomously within enterprise environments.

news.title: Omada Agent Governance, Extends Identity Governance to AI Agents
news.summary: Omada Identity has launched "Omada Agent Governance," a new solution designed to extend identity governance capabilities to AI agents. The product focuses on discovering AI agents, establishing accountability, managing their access, and reducing risk across cloud environments.

news.title: Keeper Security Introduces Universal Secrets Sync to Eliminate Credential Drift Across Cloud Environments
news.summary: Keeper Security has launched Universal Secrets Sync, a new KeeperPAM feature that automatically distributes rotated secrets across AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud in a single rotation event. The capability is designed to eliminate credential drift by removing manual steps from the secrets synchronization process in multi-cloud environments.

news.title: Hackers Used Meta’s AI Support Bot to Seize Instagram Accounts
news.summary: Hackers exploited Meta's AI support assistant bot to reset Instagram account passwords and seize accounts, including the Obama White House and U.S. Space Force accounts. Instructions circulating on Telegram demonstrated how to social-engineer the AI bot into bypassing normal account authentication and recovery processes.

news.title: Lawmakers Demand Answers as CISA Tries to Contain Data Leak
news.summary: A CISA contractor intentionally published AWS GovCloud keys and other agency secrets to a public GitHub account, causing a data breach that CISA is still working to contain. Congressional lawmakers from both chambers are demanding answers from CISA as the agency works to invalidate the leaked credentials.

news.title: CISA Admin Leaked AWS GovCloud Keys on Github
news.summary: A CISA contractor exposed highly privileged AWS GovCloud account credentials and internal system access details in a public GitHub repository until this past weekend. The leaked files included information on how CISA builds, tests, and deploys software internally, revealing privileged access credentials to multiple government systems.
